leadText: The Fairy Gem (Japanese: フェアリージュエル Fairy Jewel) is a type of held item that first appeared in game data in Generation VI. It is one of the Gems. It cannot be obtained in any game.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Fairy-type move used by 30%, and is consumed after use. Fling will fail if the user is holding a Fairy Gem.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] The Fairy Gem has not been obtainable in any game.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A gem with an essence of the fey. When held, it strengthens the power of a Fairy-type move one time. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of fairies and will boost the power of a Fairy-type move—but only once.
